description: Comprehensive 4-panel summary of all evidence against intein annotation of Rv0311
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive summary figure with all evidence

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))

# Panel 1: Foldseek results summary
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
ax1.set_title('Foldseek Structural Homology Search', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax1.axis('off')

foldseek_data = [
    ['AlphaFold DB', '653', 'All uncharacterized\nproteins', '0', 'E < 1e-55'],
    ['PDB100', '7', 'TRAPPII (best),\nno inteins', '0', 'E > 0.23\n(not significant)'],
]
col_labels = ['Database', 'Hits', 'Top matches', 'Intein\nhits', 'Best E-value']
table1 = ax1.table(cellText=foldseek_data, colLabels=col_labels, loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table1.auto_set_font_size(False)
table1.set_fontsize(9)
table1.scale(1, 2.0)
for j in range(5):
    table1[(0, j)].set_facecolor('#4472C4')
    table1[(0, j)].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')
# Highlight zero intein hits
for i in range(1, 3):
    table1[(i, 3)].set_facecolor('#FFE0E0')
    table1[(i, 3)].set_text_props(color='red', fontweight='bold')

# Panel 2: Domain database search summary
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
ax2.set_title('Domain Database Search Results', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.axis('off')

domain_data = [
    ['NCBI CDD', '0 hits', 'No conserved domain'],
    ['InterPro', '0 matches', 'No domain recognized'],
    ['Pfam', '0 families', 'No Pfam family'],
    ['PROSITE', '0 current', 'No pattern/profile match'],
    ['InBase', 'Not listed', 'Not a registered intein'],
    ['KEGG', 'hypothetical', 'No pathway assignment'],
    ['UniProt', 'TrEMBL, score 1.0', 'Unreviewed, minimal'],
]
col_labels2 = ['Database', 'Result', 'Interpretation']
table2 = ax2.table(cellText=domain_data, colLabels=col_labels2, loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table2.auto_set_font_size(False)
table2.set_fontsize(9)
table2.scale(1, 1.6)
for j in range(3):
    table2[(0, j)].set_facecolor('#4472C4')
    table2[(0, j)].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

# Panel 3: Intein catalytic block checklist (visual)
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
ax3.set_title('Intein Catalytic Block Assessment', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

blocks = ['Block A\n(N-Cys/Ser)', 'Block B\n(TXXH)', 'Block F\n(DxxHxxG)', 'Block G\n(pen. His)', 'Block G\n(term. Asn)',
          'Hint domain\nfold', 'LAGLIDADG\nmotif', 'InterPro\nintein', 'CDD\nintein']
scores = [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]  # All absent

colors = ['#FF4444' for _ in scores]
bars = ax3.barh(range(len(blocks)), [1]*len(blocks), color=colors, edgecolor='darkred', height=0.7)

# Add X marks
for i, (block, score) in enumerate(zip(blocks, scores)):
    ax3.text(0.5, i, '✗ ABSENT', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=11, 
             fontweight='bold', color='white')

ax3.set_yticks(range(len(blocks)))
ax3.set_yticklabels(blocks, fontsize=9)
ax3.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax3.set_xticks([])
ax3.set_xlabel('Score: 0/9 features present', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax3.invert_yaxis()

# Panel 4: Protein family context
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.set_title('M. tuberculosis Intein Inventory\nvs. Rv0311', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax4.axis('off')

context_data = [
    ['RecA (Rv2737c)', '~440 aa', 'Yes', 'Experimentally\nvalidated'],
    ['SufB (Rv1461)', '~147 aa', 'Yes', 'Experimentally\nvalidated'],
    ['DnaB (Rv0058)', '~460 aa', 'Yes', 'Experimentally\nvalidated'],
    ['Rv0311', '409 aa', 'NO', 'All catalytic\nresidues absent'],
]
col_labels4 = ['Gene', 'Intein size', 'Intein?', 'Evidence']
table4 = ax4.table(cellText=context_data, colLabels=col_labels4, loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table4.auto_set_font_size(False)
table4.set_fontsize(10)
table4.scale(1, 2.0)
for j in range(4):
    table4[(0, j)].set_facecolor('#4472C4')
    table4[(0, j)].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')
# Highlight Rv0311 row
for j in range(4):
    table4[(4, j)].set_facecolor('#FFE0E0')
table4[(4, 2)].set_text_props(color='red', fontweight='bold')

plt.suptitle('Rv0311: Comprehensive Evidence Against Intein Annotation', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)
plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.96])
plt.savefig('comprehensive_evidence.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: comprehensive_evidence.png")
